backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, notes management with blob storage, study groups, quizzes, viva questions, and Stripe payment integration with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of user profile display in header and tech head circuit brain logo replacement across the application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality and integration points.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for consistent styling across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Student Vibe React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes, splash screen on startup, and profile setup modal for first-time authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/DashboardCard.ts: Reusable card component for dashboard tiles with icon, gradient background, hover effects, and click handler.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner displaying generated hero image with gradient overlay and headline promoting AI-powered study features.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing tech head logo, navigation menu, user profile display, login button, mobile menu, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Internet Identity authentication button with loading states, error handling, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal component for first-time user profile setup, collecting name, email, and college information with form validation and loading states.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Animated splash screen component with three-phase animation (fade-in, hold, fade-out) displaying the app logo and name with gradient effects.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionCard: Displays free and premium subscription tiers with feature comparisons and handles Stripe checkout session creation for premium upgrades.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileDispl: Shows authenticated user's avatar, name, college, and premium status badge in a compact display component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication and initializes access control with admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCheckoutSess: Mutation hook for creating Stripe checkout sessions with shopping items and success/cancel URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateStudyGroup.t: Mutation hook for creating study groups with ID, name, and description, invalidating study group queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile, handling actor availability and loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validity.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsStripeConfigured: Query hook that checks if Stripe payment integration is configured in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useJoinStudyGroup.ts: Mutation hook for joining a study group by ID, invalidating related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of query hooks for fetching notes, study groups, quizzes, and viva questions by various identifiers.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook for saving the current user's profile and invalidating the profile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveQuiz.ts: Mutation hook for saving quiz questions by quiz ID, invalidating quiz queries on success.
React Query mutation hook for saving viva questions to the backend, invalidating the vivaQuestions cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadNote.ts: React Query mutation hook for uploading notes with metadata and file content as ExternalBlob, invalidating the notes cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom blue-purple gradient theme variables for light and dark modes, plus utility classes for glow effects, animations, and glassmorphism.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseNotesPage.tsx: Page for browsing and searching notes by subject with filters, displaying note cards that navigate to detail view or download directly.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page showing welcome message, user premium status, navigation cards for key features, and subscription plan information.
frontend/src/pages/GroupDetailPage.tsx: Study group detail page displaying group name, description, and member list with navigation back to groups list.
frontend/src/pages/NoteDetailPage.tsx: Note detail page showing metadata, download button, and AI study tools (summary, quiz, viva) with navigation to related features.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Payment failure page with error message and options to retry payment or return to dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Payment success page confirming premium subscription activation and listing premium benefits with dashboard navigation.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Quiz page placeholder indicating that quiz generation requires premium subscription and external AI integration.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: React page component for displaying and creating study groups with a form to input group name and description, navigating to the created group upon submission.
frontend/src/pages/UploadNotePage.tsx: React page component for uploading college notes with file selection, metadata input (subject, topic, semester, college), and free tier upload limit warnings for non-premium users.
frontend/src/pages/VivaPage.tsx: React page component displaying a placeholder message for viva question generation feature, indicating it requires premium subscription and external AI service integration.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended border radius values, glow/neon shadow effects, and custom animations for the UI theme.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting Student Vibe app architecture, features, requirements mapping, and tech stack including React frontend, Internet Identity auth, Stripe payments, and AI integration.
